bench.prompt: You are completing a repository-wide Go refactoring task. Use the shell and file editing tools. Workflow: grep with a name fragment to find every file mentioning the symbol, read the surrounding code to confirm which occurrences are the symbol and not a lookalike, edit the declaration and every reference, then run go build to check your work. Renames of a naming family need every symbol updated at all of its references. The compiler is your validator; a build error tells you exactly what to fix, adjust and retry.
